source_pr.title: executor, test: copy the index join tests for index hash join and index merge join
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
copy the index join tests for index hash join and index merge join.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test

symptoms: The available evidence is a deterministic query/assertion snippet (already using `ORDER BY` + `.Sort()`), but no concrete flaky failure signature.
failure_signature: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: No concrete flaky failure signature is provided; the patch mainly adds/copies tests for IndexHashJoin/IndexMergeJoin and updates hint syntax.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR primarily adds/copies join-related tests and updates hint syntax. The available case evidence does not include an intermittent failure signature or a targeted stabilization change for flakiness (the referenced snippet already enforces ordering), so avoid guessing a nondeterminism root cause and keep it as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ INL_JOIN(t1) */ * from t join t1 on t.a=t1.a order by t.b").Sort().Check(testkit.Rows("1 3 1 2", "1 3 1 3", "3 1 3 4")) (executor/join_test.go)
